info.name: Automated Log Triager API
info.description: Enterprise-grade asynchronous pipeline that ingests logs, masks PII data, searches a ChromaDB RAG, and uses CrewAI/Gemini to diagnose failures.

request.description: Ingests a batch of technical manual entries into ChromaDB to serve as context for the RAG architecture.
Receives a raw transaction log. Validates via Pydantic, triggers the background pipeline (Masking -> RAG -> AI Agent), and returns a 202 Accepted.
Retrieves all processed reports (both Successful Diagnoses and Fallback Errors) from the in-memory storage. Used by the web dashboard for real-time polling.

response.name: Success
